title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at CRISIL Consulting Pvt Ltd - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at CRISIL Consulting Pvt Ltd - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Risk Analyst with drive and ambition, CRISIL Consulting Pvt Ltd in Meerut is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About CRISIL Consulting Pvt Ltd:
CRISIL Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in Risk Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual performance appraisal
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Meerut, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with CRISIL Consulting Pvt Ltd!
